Бренди рухають світ. Ми рухаємо бренди в: Brands move the world. We move brands forward.
Брендингова агенція, орієнтована на диза: A design-led branding agency creating names, identities, and digital presence for growing businesses.
Чіткі, запам’ятовувані назви, готові жит: Names that are clear, memorable, and ready to live in the market.
Логотипи та дизайн-системи, що масштабую: Logo, typography, colors, and guidelines — so your brand feels recognizable and strong.
Брендові матеріали, презентації та візуа: Visual assets, layouts, and design systems that look premium and consistent everywhere.
Сайти, що передають бренд, підтримують п: Design that converts — clean UX, strong hierarchy, and pixel-perfect visuals.
Анімація та переходи, що додають енергії: Animations and transitions that add energy and make your brand feel alive.
Розкажіть про бізнес, ідею або новий нап: Tell us about your business, idea, or new direction — we’ll see how design can help.
Ми цінуємо чіткість, комунікацію та довг: We value clarity, communication, and long-term collaboration — our clients notice that.
Вони зрозуміли наш продукт краще за нас: They understood our product better than we did. The redesign cut our support tickets in half and users genuinely enjoy the platform now.
Чітка структура, виважені UX-рішення та: Great structure, solid UX decisions and fast iterations. The final result reduced friction and improved conversions.
Маленька команда, що працює як велика. Б: A small team that delivers like a big one. Branding, site and motion — all consistent and on time.
Чіткий процес від першого дзвінка, прозо: Clear process from the first call, transparent deadlines and a result we were proud to launch. Working with the team was effortless.
Вони занурились у наші метрики, а не лиш: They dug into our metrics, not just the visuals. The new interface is faster, cleaner and finally feels like our brand.
Від неймінгу до запуску — єдиний голос б: From naming to launch — one consistent voice. Our conversion grew and the brand finally looks like the leader we want to be.
Колір – брендингова агенція, орієнтована: Kolir is a design-driven branding agency helping businesses grow through clear identity and thoughtful communication. We work with local brands and new business directions that need to look mature from day one. By combining strategy, design, and marketing, we create brands that are not just beautiful but effective.
Наша мета — перетворити складність на яс: Our focus is turning complexity into clarity and building systems that last.
Від неймінгу до вебсайту — ми допомагаєм: From naming to website — we help brands look consistent and confident.
Залиште електронну пошту та коментар — м: Leave your email and comment and we will contact you to discuss the project.
Напр. Потрібен лендінг для запуску проду: e.g. We need a landing page for a product launch…
Брендингова агенція KOLIR (надалі може і: KOLIR Branding agency (hereinafter may referred to as "Kolir", "We" or "Us") respects your privacy and strives to offer You a safe customer experience. Kolir is committed to safeguarding personal data and operating its business with high standards of practice in data privacy, security compliance and strict adherence to EU, UK and US legislation on personal data protection (GDPR, DPA, CPRA and CCPA etc.). With this Privacy & Cookies Policy We want to tell You about what data We collect when You use Our Services, and how We use and handle this data. We will also tell You where to find out more about how Your personal information is handled and what rights You have with respect to this information.

KOLIR Branding agency (hereinafter may referred to as "Kolir", "We" or "Us") respects your privacy and strives to offer You a safe customer experience. Kolir is committed to safeguarding personal data and operating its business with high standards of practice in data privacy, security compliance and strict adherence to EU, UK and US legislation on personal data protection (GDPR, DPA, CPRA and CCPA etc.). With this Privacy & Cookies Policy We want to tell You about what data We collect when You use Our Services, and how We use and handle this data. We will also tell You where to find out more about how Your personal information is handled and what rights You have with respect to this information.
Ця Політика поширюється лише на використ: This Privacy & Cookies Policy governs only Kolir use and disclosure of information we collect when a User elects to use Our Services, visit a publisher's web site while using Our Services, or when You review advertisements that We serve. This Privacy & Cookies Policy does not otherwise apply to the practices of other web sites, third-party advertisers or advertising networks, or other services or companies that we do not own, manage or control. We do not control the privacy practices of such third parties, and you are subject to the privacy policies of those third parties when You use their services, products or web-sites.
Як пояснюється більш детально нижче, ми: As We explain in more detail below, we may collect information about you through the following means: when You complete registration of an Account with Kolir; when You visit our Site; when You visit any web site using Our Services; or when You review or respond to advertisements served by Us or on Our behalf.
Якщо ви вирішите зареєструвати обліковий: If you elect to register an Account with Us, You will provide Us with certain information, some of which identifies You personally, such as Your email address, and other registration information. You may from time to time also provide Us with additional information about if You engage in any other transactions with Us, for example, when You give Us your cell phone number to seek customer support.
Користуючись нашим Сервісом, Ви розумієт: By use of our Service You understand and agree that we are providing a public platform and that We or other Users may search for, see, use, re-post any of Your Content that you make publicly available through Our Services. Capitalized terms not defined in this Privacy & Cookies Policy shall have the meaning given them in the User Agreement.
Ми використовуємо та розкриваємо інформа: We use and disclose information we collect when a User visits the Site, elects to use Our Services, enters a publisher's web site or views the Content.
Ми також можемо зберігати будь-які повід: We may also retain any messages you send either through the Services or in other way defined by the User Agreement, and may collect information you provide in the Content. We may receive Personally Identifiable Information about You from third parties, including, for example, information about Your transactions, purchase history, or relationships with various product and service providers, and Your usage of certain applications.
Ми збираємо інформацію, коли Користувач: We collect information when a User visits the Site, uses or interacts with Our Services, visits our partner publishers' web sites and views or clicks advertisements that We serve or are served on Our behalf.
Файли cookie — це невеликі текстові файл: Cookies are small text files that are stored on your device (computer, tablet, smartphone) when You visit a website. They help the website function properly, improve your browsing experience, and provide analytics data to the website owner.
Забезпечення коректної та безпечної робо: Ensure the Website functions correctly and securely.
Аналізу поведінки користувачів для покра: Analyze user behavior to improve the Website's content and functionality.
Provide tailored advertising and measure its effectiveness.
Remember your preferences to enhance your user experience.
Ми також використовуємо піксельні теги,: Most often We use cookies and pixel tags to collect the Usage Information.
Піксельний тег — це невеликий графічний: A pixel tag is a small graphic file that allows Us to measure the use of the Services. Pixel tags allow to collect information such as IP address of the computer that downloaded the page on which the tag appears, the URL of the page on which the pixel tag appears, the time (and length of time) the page containing the pixel tag is viewed, and the identification number (the long string of characters) of any cookie previously placed by that server on your computer.
Файл cookie також може передавати інформ: A cookie may also convey information about how a User uses the Service (e.g., the viewed pages, clicked links and other actions taken while use of the Services), and allows Kolir or the latter's business partners to track usage of the Services by the respective User.
Постійний файл cookie залишається на жор: A persistent cookie remains on User's hard drive after browser is closed. Persistent cookies may be used by a browser on subsequent visits of the Site. Persistent cookies can be removed by following web browser directions. A session cookie is temporary and disappears after browser is closed. You can reset Your web browser to refuse all cookies or to indicate when a cookie is being sent. However, some features of the Service may not function properly if the ability to accept cookies is disabled.
Ми використовуємо файли cookie для уніка: We use cookies to uniquely identify a browser, which gives advertisers the ability to show targeted ads that are relevant to the respective User. If You would prefer us not to store a unique cookie in Your browser, You may opt out. Note that by opting out, You still will receive advertising from Kolir when You visit our Site or use our Services (it will not be targeted to You).
Коли ви відвідуєте наш Веб-сайт вперше,: When you visit our Website for the first time, you will see a cookie banner asking for your consent to use cookies. By clicking «Accept All Cookies», you consent to the use of cookies as described in this Policy. You can modify your preferences or withdraw consent at any time by accessing the cookie settings on our Website.
Ми можемо оновлювати цю Політику, щоб ві: We may update this Policy to reflect changes in our use of cookies or legal requirements. Any updates will be published on this page with the effective date.
Якщо у вас є питання щодо цієї Політики: If you have questions about this Cookie Policy or wish to exercise your data protection rights, please contact us:
Ми та сторонні постачальники послуг вико: We (and the third-party service providers working on our behalf) use various technologies to collect personal data.
Ми використовуємо як власні, так і сторо: We use both our and third-party analytics tools to help assess and estimate traffic and usage trends as regards the Services. These tools collect information sent by Your browser as part of a web page request, including the web pages You visit, Your browser add-ons, Your browser's width and height, and other information that assists Us in improving the Service. We collect and use this analytics information in aggregate form such that it cannot reasonably be manipulated to identify any User.
Коли Ви користуєтеся Сервісом, ми можемо: When You use the Service, we may use clear GIFs (also known as web beacons), which are used to anonymously track the online usage patterns of Our Users. In addition, we may also use clear GIFs in HTML-based emails sent to Our Users to track which emails are opened and which links are clicked by recipients. This information allows for more accurate reporting and improvement of the Service.
5. ДАНІ ПРО ВИКОРИСТАННЯ ЗІ СТОРОННІХ СА: 5. USAGE DATA FROM THIRD PARTY SITES
Ми обробляємо Персональні дані для викон: We process Personal Data to fulfill our contractual obligations in our service contracts with clients and enhance client business opportunities.
Ми використовуємо Персональні дані для т: We use Personally Identifiable Information for the following purposes: to analyse how the Services are used; to check of service or technical problems; security maintenance; to operate, maintain, and provide a User with the features and functionality of the Service; to fulfill User's requests; to personalize your experience and to provide You with information and offers from Us or third parties which at Our discretion are useful or interesting for You, including newsletters, marketing or promotional materials and other information on other services and products offered by Us or third parties.
Після припинення дії або деактивації Ваш: Following termination or deactivation of your Account, Kolir will retain Your profile information and User Content for a commercially reasonable time for backup, archival, or audit purposes. Furthermore, Kolir may retain and continue to use indefinitely all information (including User Content) contained in Your communications to other Users or posted to public or semi-public areas of the Services after termination or deactivation of your Account.
Kolir залишає за собою право, але не має: Kolir reserves the right, but has no obligation, to monitor the User Content posted or shared by a User using Our Services. We reserve the right to remove any such information or material for any reason or no reason, including without limitation if in Our sole discretion such information or material violates, or may violate, any applicable Law or the User Agreement, or to protect or defend Our rights or property or those of any third party. Kolir shall have the right to remove information upon reasonable request from any third party.
Ми не будемо передавати, передавати або: We will not transfer, assign or sell your Personally Identifiable Information to third parties outside Kolir and its Affiliates without your written consent, except as noted below.
Ми можемо передавати Вашу особисту інфор: We may share your Personally Identifiable Information with third-party business partners for the purpose of providing the Services to You. Those business partners will be given limited access to the Personally Identifiable Information that is reasonably necessary to deliver the Services, and We will require that such third parties comply with this Privacy & Cookies Policy.
Будь-яка інформація, що дозволяє ідентиф: Any Personally Identifiable Information and Content may become available to the public, as controlled by any applicable privacy settings. To change Your privacy settings please change your Account settings. If you remove information that You posted while using the Services, copies may remain viewable in cached and archived pages of the Services, or if other Users have copied or saved that information.
Ми можемо купувати або продавати/відчужу: We may buy or sell/divest our company, or any combination of its products, services, assets and/or businesses. Personally Identifiable Information will likely be among the items transferred in these types of transactions. We may also transfer or assign such information in the course of corporate divestitures, mergers, acquisitions, bankruptcies, dissolutions or similar transactions or proceedings.
Kolir розкриватиме особисту інформацію,: Kolir will disclose Personally Identifiable Information where required to do so by the applicable Law or subpoena or if we reasonably believe that such action is necessary to (a) comply with the Law and the reasonable requests of law enforcement agencies; (b) to enforce our User Agreement or to protect the security or integrity of our Services or other Users; and/or (c) to exercise or protect the rights, property, or personal safety of Kolir and Our Users.
Всі особисті дані, надіслані або зібрані: All personal data sent or collected via or by Kolir may be stored anywhere in the world, including the EU and United States, in the cloud, our servers, the servers of our affiliates or the servers of our service providers. Your personal data may be accessible to law enforcement or other authorities pursuant to a lawful request.
У разі передачі даних за межі ЄЕЗ, Велик: In the case of transfers of data out of the EEA, UK, or Switzerland, we implement Standard Contractual Clauses as set forth by the European Commission and International Data Transfer Agreements as set forth by the Information Commissioner.
Ми можемо використовувати вашу інформаці: We may use your Non-Personally Identifiable Information: to fulfill requests for Our Services; to communicate with You and respond to Your inquiries; to conduct research about the use of the Services; to enable You to create an Account, store log-in credentials, and customize our Services; to contact You from time to time about Our Services; and to provide offers for new products and services of Kolir.
Ми не продаємо Ваші персональні дані!: We do not sell your Personal Data!
Ми можемо передавати інформацію, що не д: We may share Non-Personally Identifiable Information, including information obtained through tools such as cookies, log files, device identifiers, location data and clear gifs (such as anonymous usage data, referring/exit pages and URLs, platform types, number of clicks, etc.): in any manner permitted for Personally Identifiable Information; and with our third-party business partners for the purposes described in the section above.
Ми також можемо агрегувати або іншим чин: We may also aggregate or otherwise strip data of all personally identifying characteristics and may share that aggregated, anonymized data with third parties.
Ми можемо надавати неагреговані, неідент: We may share non-aggregate, non-personally identifiable Usage Information, including Audience Segments, with third party advertisers and publishers to assist in delivering the relevant, targeted advertising that is aligned with User interests. We may also share aggregate statistical information about Our Services with advertisers and publishers. We do not provide the Personally Identifiable Information to such third parties.
Зверніть увагу, що рекламодавець може по: Please note that an advertiser may ask Kolir to show an ads to a certain audience of Users (e.g., based on demographics or other interests). In that situation, Kolir determines the targeted audience and Kolir serves the advertising to that audience and only provides anonymous aggregated data to the respective advertiser. If You respond to such ads, the advertiser or ads server may conclude that You fit the description of the audience they are trying to reach.
Ця Політика конфіденційності та використ: This Privacy & Cookies Policy does not apply to, and we cannot control the activities of, third-party advertisers and External Websites. Please consult the respective privacy policies of such advertisers or contact such advertisers who operate the respective External Websites for more information.
Кожен користувач може переглядати, оновл: Each Users may review, update or correct the Personally Identifiable Information provided to Kolir while registration (creation) of their Accounts. If You choose to opt out entirely, then Your Account may become deactivated and You will need to re-register should You decide to opt-in again. To delete Your Account and information entirely or to prevent Kolir from processing Your data please email our Support
Ви розумієте та погоджуєтеся з тим, що м: You understand and agree that We are not able to remove your Personally Identifiable Information from the records of any third party who has been provided with Your information in compliance with the use and sharing policy outlined above.
Залежно від місця Вашого проживання, Ви: Depending on where you reside, there may be certain rights that you can exercise regarding your Personal Data. We have listed key privacy rights below:
Право отримати підтвердження того, чи об: Right to obtain confirmation as to whether or not your Personal Data is being processed, and to obtain access to specific information about the processing.
Право на виправлення неточних персональн: Right to obtain rectification of inaccurate Personal Data and the right to have incomplete Personal Data completed.
Право на видалення Персональних даних, з: Right to obtain erasure of Personal Data, subject to certain GDPR requirements.
Право на обмеження обробки персональних: Right to obtain restriction of processing of Personal Data where (a) accuracy is contested and being verified, (b) processing is unlawful, (c) data is not needed but for processing but is required for legal claims, or (d) following an objection to processing where legitimate grounds for processing are being verified.
Право на отримання Персональних даних та: Right to receive Personal Data and transmit to another controller.
Право на заперечення проти прямого марке: Right to object to direct marketing; the right to object on grounds of particular situation.
Право не підлягати рішенню, яке ґрунтуєт: Right not to be subject to a decision based solely on automated decision-making, including profiling; a right to appeal.
Для резидентів Європейської економічної: For Residents of the European Economic Area ("EEA"):
Право знати, яка персональна інформація: Right to know what personal information is being collected
Right to know what personal information is sold or shared and to whom
Право відмовитися від продажу або переда: Right to opt out of sale or sharing of personal information
Право на виправлення неточної персональн: Right to correct inaccurate personal information
Право на обмеження використання та розкр: Right to limit use and disclosure of sensitive personal information
Право на відсутність репресій після відм: Right of no retaliation following opt out or exercise of other rights
Ми використовуємо технічні та організаці: We use technical and organizational measures to protect the Personal Data that we store, transmit, or otherwise process, against accidental or unlawful destruction, loss, alteration, unauthorized disclosure or access. We regularly consider appropriate new security technologies and methods as we maintain and develop our software and systems. We ensure that all our employees and contractors complete mandatory annual privacy and security training.
Ми дуже дбаємо про захист Вашої інформац: We are very concerned with safeguarding Your information. We use commercially reasonable safeguards to preserve the integrity and security of all information collected by Us from each User. To protect Your privacy and security, We will take reasonable steps (such as requesting a unique password) to verify Your identity before granting You access to Account. You are responsible for maintaining the secrecy of the User Account Data, and for controlling access to Your email communications from Kolir, at all times.
Незважаючи на вищезазначені заходи, Koli: Notwithstanding the foregoing measures, Kolir cannot ensure or warrant the security of any information You provide or transfer to Kolir or guarantee that information on the Services may not be accessed, disclosed, altered, or destroyed. Your privacy settings may also be affected by changes to the functionality of Our providers, such as social networks. We are not liable and responsible for the functionality or security measures of any third party and External Websites.
Цей Сайт не призначений для осіб віком д: This Site is not directed to individuals under 18 years old. We do not knowingly collect or solicit personal information from individuals under 18 or knowingly allow such persons to register an Account. If You are under 18, please do not send any information about Yourself to Us, including name, address, telephone number, or email address.
Особам віком до 18 років заборонено нада: No one under age of 18 is allowed to provide any personal information to or on Kolir. In the event that we learn that we have collected personal information from an individual whose age is under 18, we will delete that information as quickly as possible. If You believe that we might have any information from or about an individual under 18, please contact us at
Якщо Угода користувача між Вами та Kolir: If the User Agreement between You and Kolir incorporates this Privacy & Cookies Policy, or You otherwise use Our Services and products that incorporates this Privacy & Cookies Policy, You must ensure that necessary disclosures are given to, and consents obtained from, end users in the European Economic Area. If you fail to comply with this Privacy & Cookies Policy, We may limit or suspend You from use of the Services and/or terminate the User Agreement between You and Kolir.
Ви повинні отримати юридично дійсну згод: You must obtain end users' legally valid consent to the use cookies or other local storage where required by the Law and the collection, sharing, and use of personal data for personalization of ads.
Під час отримання згоди Ви повинні збері: When seeking consent You must retain records of consent given by each of Yours end user; and provide end users with clear instructions for revocation of consent. You must clearly identify each party that may collect, receive, or use end users' personal data as a consequence of Your use of the Services. You must also provide end users with easily accessible information about that party's use of end users' personal data.
Якщо ви приймаєте цю Політику конфіденці: If you are accepting these Privacy & Cookies Policy on behalf of Your customer, you warrant that: (a) you have full legal authority to bind Your customer by this Privacy & Cookies Policy; (b) You have read carefully and understand this Privacy & Cookies Policy; and (c) You agree, on behalf of each of Your customers, to this Privacy & Cookies Policy. If you do not have the legal authority to bind each of Your customer or Your level of protection is not at least equivalent to that required under this Privacy & Cookies Policy, You should either cease processing the personal data or take reasonable and appropriate steps to remedy such non-compliance.
Ми не несемо відповідальності за дії, що: We are not responsible for the practices employed by External Websites linked to or from the Service, nor the information or content contained therein. Please remember that when You use a link to go from the Services to an External Website, our Privacy & Cookies Policy is not applicable to such External Website. Your browsing and interaction on any External Website, including those that have a link on Our Site, is subject to that website's own rules and policies. Please read over those rules and policies before proceeding.
Kolir може, на власний розсуд, час від ч: Kolir may, in its sole discretion, modify or update this Privacy & Cookies Policy from time to time, and so You should review this page each time You are using our Services. When we change this Privacy & Cookies Policy, we will update the 'last modified' date of this page. Your continued use of the Site following the posting of any changes to this Privacy & Cookies Policy means that You accept such changes.
Ми залишаємо за собою право передавати В: We reserve the right to transfer Your personal information in the event of a transfer of ownership of Kolir, such as acquisition by or merger with other company.
Ви завжди маєте можливість закрити свій: You always have the option to terminate Your Account at any time.
Якщо у Вас є питання або Вам потрібні ро: If you have any questions or need some clarification on this Privacy & Cookies Policy, please do not hesitate to email us at
Останнє оновлення цієї Політики: 28 люто: This Privacy & Cookies Policy was last updated on 28 February 2026.
Від початку війни ми адаптували робочі п: Since the start of the war, we have adapted workflows and expanded our activities. Despite the forced relocation of some specialists, the team remains united in striving to be as helpful as possible to Ukraine.
Поки наші українські воїни захищають рід: While our Ukrainian soldiers defend their homeland, the Kolir team also helps our country move closer to victory. We don't wear uniforms or carry weapons. We have a pen and a computer mouse in our hands — this is how we support the Ukrainian army in this terrible war. The world has the opportunity to buy NFTs to support Ukraine and the Ukrainian armed forces.
Не кожен може тримати в руках кулемет, а: Not everyone can hold a machine gun, but absolutely everyone can help in the information war! Join Ukraine's IT army. Together we are stronger! Join the internet army at the link below.
Найкращі спеціалісти з різних галузей об: The best specialists from various fields unite to protect Ukraine — these people felt obliged to pause their usual careers to direct their energy and resources to defending their country.
Ми конвертуємо наш досвід у реальну допо: We convert our experience into real help. We create visual solutions for military units, medical initiatives and humanitarian foundations. For us, this is a way to strengthen the country where we are strongest – in creativity.
Платформа, яка дозволяє робити улюблену: A platform that lets you do what you love — and feel your real help to the army.
Робимо все, що в наших силах. Тепер — ра: We do everything we can. Now — together with you.
Агенція цифрового брендингу Kolir з поча: Kolir, a digital branding agency, has been helping the army, charities and organizations since the start of the full-scale invasion with everything it can: web design, graphics, development, art.
Ми віримо, що лише спільними зусиллями в: We believe that only through the joint efforts of the whole country and the world can we survive and win — and we do everything in our power for that.
Зараз проєктів, яким потрібна допомога,: Right now there are more projects in need of help than there are of us. So we are looking for volunteers who will help the army and the state — and add real, meaningful cases to their portfolio.
Інтерфейси сайтів, застосунків, дашборді: Interfaces for sites, apps and dashboards.
Animation, clips, content for social media.
Реальні волонтерські проєкти, які ми зро: Real volunteer projects we delivered together with designers, illustrators and developers who joined us.
Залиш заявку — підберемо проєкт під твої: Leave a request — we'll match a project to your skills.
Ми не питатимемо про десятирічний досвід: We won't ask about ten years of experience or demand a week-long test task. Tell us what you can do and how much time you can give — we'll figure out the rest.
Долучайся — реальні волонтерські проєкти: Join in — real volunteer projects for the army and foundations, cases for your portfolio, and no bureaucracy.
Реальні проєкти для ЗСУ та фондів: Real projects for the Armed Forces and foundations
Кейси, які не соромно додати в портфоліо: Cases you won't be ashamed to add to your portfolio
Жодної бюрократії — пишемо в Telegram: No bureaucracy — we write on Telegram
Досвід, посилання на портфоліо, скільки: Experience, portfolio links, how much time you can give

Створюємо логотипи, що точно передають х: We design logos that clearly express brand character and scale effortlessly.
Проєктуємо сайти як частину бренду, а не: We design websites as an extension of the brand, not just a visual layer.
Формуємо чіткі правила використання брен: We create clear brand guidelines for teams and partners.
Розробляємо посадкові сторінки під конкр: We design landings around a specific business goal: launch, sales, or validation.
Створюємо брендовані відео для презентац: Branded videos for presentations, advertising, and digital platforms.
Дизайнимо рекламні та бренд-комунікаційн: We design banners for advertising and brand communication campaigns.
Продумуємо форму, символіку й використан: Every mark is built to work consistently across digital and physical environments.
Фокус — структура, меседжі та досвід кор: Structure, messaging, and user experience are built to support trust and conversion.
Брендбук допомагає зберігати послідовніс: A structured brandbook ensures consistency and recognition across all touchpoints.
Поєднуємо дизайн, копірайтинг і логіку в: Design, copy, and structure work together as one conversion-focused system.
Фокусуємось на ідеї, ритмі та візуальній: Concept, pacing, and visual language stay aligned with the brand.
Чіткий меседж, сильний візуал і адаптаці: Clear messaging, strong visuals, and adaptation for multiple formats.
Хочете переглянути всі приклади робіт?: Want to see all our work?
Сайт «15 кроків до української єдності»: The «15 Steps to Ukrainian Unity» website is a consistent introduction to the development of our country. Its primary goal is to acquaint the public with the history of Ukrainian statehood, as well as to find new candidates for future projects.
Strichka — цифровий простір для українці: Strichka is a digital space for Ukrainians abroad that unites the community, initiatives and useful materials in one place. We built a platform that helps you easily find everything that matters: a project overview, tips, blogs, initiatives and quick access to the app. It is the single entry point into the Strichka ecosystem — for interaction, coordination and support of Ukrainians around the world.
Українська технологічна компанія, що роз: A Ukrainian technology company that develops and mass-produces autonomous systems adapted to real combat conditions. We built a multi-page website that reflects the company's holistic ecosystem of solutions, where engineering is shaped by the practical experience of its use.
